paper.title: Selective organ targeting (SORT) nanoparticles for tissue-specific mRNA delivery and CRISPR-Cas gene editing

formulations.targeting_details: Base 4-component mDLNP. Liver-tropic. No SORT molecule.
formulations.formulation_notes: Standard Siegwart lab mDLNP. Lipid:mRNA weight ratio 40:1. This is the starting point from which SORT LNPs are derived.

formulations.targeting_details: Lung SORT: 50 mol% DOTAP as 5th component. Endogenous targeting via cationic charge-dependent protein corona.
formulations.formulation_notes: 50% DOTAP shifts delivery exclusively to lung. Cationic quaternary ammonium lipid. DDAB and EPC also work as lung-targeting SORT molecules.

formulations.targeting_details: Spleen SORT: 30 mol% 18PA (anionic lipid) as 5th component. Citrate buffer pH 3.0.
formulations.formulation_notes: 30% anionic SORT lipid (18PA) shifts delivery to spleen. Maximum spleen selectivity at ~30% anionic lipid.

formulations.targeting_details: Liver SORT: 20 mol% DODAP (ionizable cationic lipid). Enhances liver delivery >10-fold vs base mDLNP.
formulations.formulation_notes: 20% ionizable cationic SORT lipid maximizes liver delivery. DODAP or C12-200 or additional 5A2-SC8 all enhance liver.

results.liver_notes: Systematic titration: 0% DOTAP = liver dominant. 5-15% DOTAP = spleen increases. 20-40% DOTAP = spleen dominant. 50%+ DOTAP = lung dominant. Liver delivery decreases monotonically with increasing DOTAP.

safety.tolerability_notes: High DOTAP (40:1 mass ratio) can cause embolisms in mice per later work

experiments.notes: Foundational SORT data. DOTAP % is the most important factor for tissue-specific delivery. Generalizable across 5A2-SC8, DLin-MC3-DMA, and C12-200 ionizable lipids. BM was NOT measured as a separate organ.

key_findings_for_project: FOUNDATIONAL PAPER: Established charge-dependent organ targeting paradigm
Cationic (DOTAP/DDAB/EPC) -> lung; Anionic (18PA) -> spleen; Ionizable cationic (DODAP) -> enhanced liver
Complete mol% compositions disclosed for all SORT formulations - excellent ML training data
Generalizable across 3 ionizable lipid classes (5A2-SC8, DLin-MC3-DMA, C12-200)
BM was NOT measured - critical gap for our project
DOTAP at 30% confirmed to shift tropism toward spleen/lung (consistent with Kim's finding that DOTAP at 30% -> lung tropism)
5A2-SC8 base formulation is the same platform used in Lian 2024 BM-homing LNPs
All lipids have known SMILES and are commercially available

comparison_to_existing_data.vs_breda: Different approach (passive charge-based vs antibody targeting). SORT demonstrates liver de-targeting principles that could complement Breda's tLNP approach.
comparison_to_existing_data.vs_shi: SORT is untargeted; Shi uses CD117 antibody. SORT shows how to reduce liver accumulation through composition alone.
comparison_to_existing_data.vs_kim: Kim's DOTAP findings (30% -> lung) are consistent with SORT's cationic lipid predictions. SORT provides the theoretical framework for Kim's empirical observations.
comparison_to_existing_data.new_pareto_points: No BM data. Cannot place on HSC-LNP Pareto. Liver de-targeting quantification is relative (fractional expression per organ), not absolute %.
comparison_to_existing_data.therapeutic_window_update: Defines the design space for charge-based liver de-targeting. Key SAR: DOTAP mol% is the primary determinant of lung:liver ratio. Already captured in your headgroup_tropism.py SHAP analysis.
comparison_to_existing_data.gap_formulation_relevance: Very high. All 4 SORT formulations have complete mol% data and known lipid SMILES. Can be directly added to feature matrix. However, these are organ-level data (liver/lung/spleen), not cell-type-level.

limitations_and_caveats: BM not measured as a separate organ in any experiment
High DOTAP concentrations (40:1 mass ratio) associated with embolism risk in mice (noted in Gentry 2025)
Translation to NHP/human uncertain - SORT mechanism depends on mouse serum protein corona
Paper behind Nature Nanotechnology paywall, but SORT protocol paper (Wang 2023, Nat Protoc) and Dilliard 2021 PNAS are more detailed and partially accessible
Luciferase readout at 6h timepoint may not reflect therapeutic cargo kinetics
